message:
🐛 Restore agent dropdown grey-out in demo mode & settings inside dropdown (#340)

PR #330 accidentally overwrote changes from commit e5f4587 which:

1. Grey out agent selector in demo mode (opacity-40 + pointer-events-none)
   instead of hiding it with an invisible placeholder — prevents layout shift
2. Move Settings gear icon inside the dropdown as an "API Key Settings"
   footer item instead of a separate navbar button
3. Sort agents in dropdown: selected agent first, then available, then
   unavailable, alphabetical within each group

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
